positive: A stylized and whimsical forest scene featuring minimalist woodland animals (fox, deer, raccoon) and glowing bioluminescent fungi, drawn in a sophisticated linework style with bold, solid color blocks and high contrast. The composition is centered, forming a clear, harmonious circular motif suitable for a chest print. Utilize a deep indigo and emerald green color palette with pops of golden yellow light. The overall aesthetic should be reminiscent of detailed, stylized illustration, perfect for apparel art. Strong, clean silhouettes and crisp edges are essential. Flat vector graphic quality.
negative: low detail, fuzzy, blur, noise, artifact, text, watermark, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, grayscale, realistic photo, photographic, complex background clutter, grain, poor composition
